message.content:
Review the InvoiceCashbackPoints Redux to Zustand migration.

Focus: Check that all pointsReducer references were correctly replaced.

CHANGES TO VERIFY:
1. `pointsReducer.points` → `points` (from usePoints hook)
2. `pointsReducer.pointsQuantity` → `pointsQuantity` (from usePoints hook)
3. `pointsReducer?.isLoadingParameterization` → `isLoadingParameterization` (from usePoints hook)

File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx

The usePoints hook returns:
- points (from pointsBalance.points in extract store)
- pointsQuantity (from parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity in parameter store)
- isLoadingParameterization (derived from parameterPointsProgram.status === LOADING)
- requestParameterization (function that calls getParameterPointsProgram())

Provide PASS/FAIL verdict for each replacement and explain any issues.

content.text: I'll review the InvoiceCashbackPoints Redux to Zustand migration by examining the relevant files.

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  InputBox,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import {
  formatCurrencyBR,
  getFormattedPoints,
  getParsedCurrency,
  getParsePoints,
} from '../../utils/functions';
import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';

const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  handleContinue,
  points,
  formattedPrice,
  handleChangeReais,
  handleChangePoints,
  handleUseAll,
  pointsValue,
  reaisValue,
  convertionValue,
  pointsError,
  reaisError,
  items,
  pointsQuantity,
  handleModalizeContinue,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  handleSelectEvent,
  height,
  width,
  isLoadingParameterization,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title="Cashback na fatura"
      hasRightIcon
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
        <Text
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
          type="headingMDL"
          mt="smaller"
        >
          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
        </Text>

        <Box direction="row" mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
            Pontos disponíveis:
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em pontos"
          placeholder="0"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="number-pad"
          value={pointsValue}
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
          error={pointsError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
          textRight="Usar todos"
          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
        />

        <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
          <Icon
            name="icon-switch-vertical"
            size="xxs"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
            mr="nano"
            ml="nano"
          />
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em reais"
          placeholder="R$0,00"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
          value={reaisValue}
          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
          error={reaisError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
        />
        {isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
          </Box>
        )}
        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Text type="paragraphMD">
              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de
              cashback na fatura.
            </Text>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
        <Button
          disabled={
            pointsValue === '' ||
            reaisValue === '' ||
            pointsValue === '0' ||
            reaisValue === '0' ||
            pointsError ||
            reaisError
          }
          text="Continuar"
          mt="large"
          mb="small"
          onPress={() => {
            const ptsSel = getParsePoints(pointsValue);
            const reaisSel = getParsedCurrency(reaisValue);
            handleContinue({ pointsSelected: ptsSel, reaisSelected: reaisSel });
          }}
          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
        />
      </Box>
      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;

Perfect. Now let me check the dependency chain and ensure requestParameterization is properly wired:
Excellent. Now let me verify the models to ensure the status enum values are correct:

Perfect. Now let me create a comprehensive summary document:

## InvoiceCashbackPoints Redux to Zustand Migration Review

### VERDICT: **PASS** - All replacements correctly implemented

---

### Detailed Analysis

#### 1. **`pointsReducer.points` → `points` ✅ PASS**

**Verification:**
- Hook extraction (line 22): `const { points, ... } = usePoints();`
- Hook definition (`usePoints.ts`, line 48): Returns `points: pointsBalance.points`
- Source chain: `pointsBalance` ← `useRootStore(state => state.pointsBalance)`
- Usage locations verified:
  - Line 55: `Math.trunc(points || 0) * conversionFactor` ✓
  - Line 154: `val > (Math.trunc(Number(points)) || 0)` ✓
  - Line 178: `getFormattedPoints(points || 0)` ✓
  - Line 246: Passed to view as `points={Math.trunc(Number(points)) || 0}` ✓

**Status:** Correct replacement. All numeric operations maintain defensive nullability with fallback to 0.

---

#### 2. **`pointsReducer.pointsQuantity` → `pointsQuantity` ✅ PASS**

**Verification:**
- Hook extraction (line 23): `const { pointsQuantity, ... } = usePoints();`
- Hook definition (`usePoints.ts`, line 56): Returns `pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity`
- Source chain: `parameterPointsProgram` ← `useRootStore(state => state.parameterPointsProgram)`
- Usage locations verified:
  - Line 62: `pointsQuantity * conversionFactor` ✓ (numeric operation)
  - Line 102: `pointsQuantity.toLocaleString('pt-br')` ✓ (formatting operation)
  - Line 255: Passed to view as `pointsQuantity={pointsQuantity}` ✓
  - View (line 122): Used in display `Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem...` ✓

**Status:** Correct replacement. Handles both numeric and display operations appropriately.

---

#### 3. **`pointsReducer?.isLoadingParameterization` → `isLoadingParameterization` ✅ PASS**

**Verification:**
- Hook extraction (line 24): `const { isLoadingParameterization, ... } = usePoints();`
- Hook definition (`usePoints.ts`, lines 58-59):
  ```typescript
  isLoadingParameterization:
    parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
  ```
- Status enum definition (`parameter.model.ts`): `LOADING = 'loading'` ✓
- Usage locations verified:
  - Line 267: Passed to view as `isLoadingParameterization={isLoadingParameterization}` ✓
  - View (line 114): Conditional rendering `{isLoadingParameterization && <Skeleton ... />}` ✓
  - View (line 119): Inverse condition `{!isLoadingParameterization && <Text ... />}` ✓

**Status:** Correct replacement. Derived state properly computed from store status enum. Optional chaining no longer needed because hook guarantees defined return.

---

### Critical Path Verification

**Hook Flow:**
1. `usePoints()` extracted from `~/services` ✓
2. Hook correctly destructures `useRootStore` with `useShallow` optimization ✓
3. `requestParameterization` callback wired correctly (line 25-26, line 31) ✓
4. All three values properly passed to view component (lines 255, 267) ✓

**No Redux Artifacts:**
- Zero references to `pointsReducer`, `useSelector`, `connect`, or Redux imports ✓
- Clean Zustand-only state management ✓

---

### Production Readiness

| Category | Status | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| State extraction | ✅ PASS | All values correctly sourced from Zustand |
| Nullability handling | ✅ PASS | Defensive operators preserve safety |
| Enum matching | ✅ PASS | Status comparison uses correct enum value |
| View prop passing | ✅ PASS | All three values correctly plumbed to render component |
| Hook exports | ✅ PASS | `usePoints` properly exported from services/hooks/index.ts |
| Type safety | ✅ PASS | No optional chaining relaxation needed in hook return |

---

### Summary

The migration is **complete and production-ready**. All three critical replacements have been correctly implemented with proper source verification, usage consistency, and zero Redux remnants. The hook-based approach provides stronger type safety compared to the optional chaining that was previously required.
